mechanics.raw_text: [PDF_PAGE 193 | score=1] ThE CLANS between Clans or t0 discuss matters affecting the Clans whole Its members have far-ranging authority when dealing with Clan-wide matters but their power strictly limited matlers concerning single Clan The Grand Council traditionally meets in Grand Kurultai, face-to face gathering the Hall ot Khans on the Clan capital of Strana Mechty: also meet in virtual kurultai" via HPG; In times of crisis, the Grand Council can elect an ilKhan war leader with Clan-wide authority: Throughout Clan history, only ten such individuals have been chosen; CLAN POLItiCS Two opposing factions dominate Clan politics The first; known as Wardens_ believes tne Clans should serve as protec tors of the Inner Sphere The second_ called Crusaders advo cates the military conquest of the Inner Sphere and the re formation of the Star League with the Clans at its head; Both factions use the writings and speeches Aleksandr and Nicholas Kerensky t0 justify their positions but demands by the civilian castes t0 return the ~lost paradise" tne Inner Sphere eventually ed t0 the Crusaders rise Currently. with the destruction of Clan Smoke Jaguar and the Crusaders loss t0 the Inner Sphere the Great Refusal Strana Mechty; the Wardens dominate Clan politics. Though they favor solationism; the Wardens crave martial victories as much as any Clansman: Despite being unwilling participants in the invasion of the Inner Sphere they considered it matter of nonor do their best.
